name: Wall Street
storySeed: You’re standing on the street that shaped the global financial system. Behind these facades, fortunes were made—and lost—in seconds.

name: New York Stock Exchange
storySeed: This is the heart of capitalism. Inside, billions move every second, yet the real power here is invisible—algorithms replacing human voices.

name: Federal Hall
storySeed: Right here, George Washington took the oath as the first President. This is where American power officially began.

name: Trinity Church
storySeed: A quiet contrast to Wall Street—this church has watched over centuries of ambition, collapse, and reinvention.

name: Charging Bull
storySeed: This bronze bull appeared overnight—and became a symbol of aggressive optimism. Markets rise… until they don’t.

name: Fearless Girl
storySeed: She stands small, but unshaken. A modern challenge to centuries of male-dominated power on Wall Street.

name: 9/11 Memorial
storySeed: Two voids mark where towers once stood. The silence here is intentional—it forces you to remember.

name: One World Trade Center
storySeed: Rising from loss, this tower reflects resilience. Its height isn’t just architectural—it’s symbolic.

name: The Oculus
storySeed: This structure looks like a bird taking flight. It’s both a transit hub—and a statement about rebirth.

name: Staten Island Ferry Terminal
storySeed: From here, the city opens to the harbor. The skyline behind you reminds you how dense—and vertical—New York is.

name: Battery Park
storySeed: At the edge of Manhattan, this park once defended the city. Today, it offers one of the calmest views of the harbor.
